name: h5g-plugins
description: High 5 Games Claude plugin marketplace — slot art generation, skill auditing, and other game-production utilities.

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audits a Claude skill against an 8-dimension quality rubric (frontmatter, description quality, instruction clarity, reference integrity, completeness, output spec, evals, security). Returns a READY / NEEDS WORK / DRAFT verdict with specific, actionable findings.

plugins.name: slot-art-creator-node
plugins.description: Generate, QA, and resize mobile slot machine art — symbols, UI, backgrounds, key art — with Nano Banana 2. Numbered slash-command workflow (slot-00 through slot-10), persistent project memory, key-art-anchored style consistency. Gemini (NB2) is the primary backend for generation, edit, upscale, and smart-resize; fal.ai (NB Pro) is the fallback when only FAL_KEY is set. Backgrounds deliver at 9:16 / 4K native (~3072×5504) — Jon Meschino's downstream pipeline handles final 1536×3324 crop. Optional GPT-image-2 for paytables, logos, and photorealistic assets; for 4K-class gpt2 output, generate at 2K then run nb2_upscale. Node.js, no Python required.

plugins.name: ai-video-generator
plugins.description: AI video generation for Claude — Veo 3.1 (fal.ai + Gemini), Happy Horse (Alibaba), and Seedance 2.0 (ByteDance). Text-to-video, image-to-video, first+last frame, reference images, and video extension. Supports fal.ai and Google Gemini API keys.
